global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with a clear focus on discounts and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a discount on products with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ThreadMark logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the word 'ThreadMark' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Discount headline
elements.description: A prominent text element stating 'Up to 40% off' in a large, eye-catching font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Shipping information
elements.description: Smaller text below the headline that reads 'Free shipping over $25', providing additional promotional information.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A subtle decorative element that adds visual interest but does not convey specific information.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Start now' in a clear, inviting font.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Product price
elements.description: The price '€19.99' displayed prominently in a bold font, indicating the cost of the product.

elements.label: Background color
elements.description: A warm, solid orange background that creates a vibrant and inviting atmosphere for the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline and body text in the center, with the price and CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ThreadMark, Up to 40% off, Free shipping over $25, €19.99, Start now
